---
name: RFC (Request for Comments)
about: Propose a non-trivial design decision for discussion before implementation.
title: "[rfc] "
labels: rfc
---

## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what are you proposing and why now. -->

## Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? Why is it worth doing? What goes wrong if we don't? -->

## Detailed design

<!-- The shape of the proposal. Code sketches, interface stubs, data flow diagrams. -->

## Drawbacks / alternatives

<!-- What this costs. Other approaches considered, with rejection rationale. -->

## Impact on locked interfaces

- Does this change anything in `docs/04-locked-interfaces.md`? Which?
- Which modules consume those interfaces today? (See `docs/03-modules.md`.)
- Is this breaking or additive?

## Open questions

<!-- Things you're not sure about, where you want feedback. -->

## Decision
